hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"Compass: context is about to compact. If a Compass build is active, write .claude/builds/<slug>/progress.md FIRST (compaction cannot be deferred) — stage, status, the first UNCHECKED plan.md step, and open ledger items — and never leave a step checkbox set whose verify did not finish. Then print the Compass resume block so the user can continue in a new terminal with /compass:resume."}'
